channel.title: Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Online radio DJ/podcaster that loves Freedom, decentralization, Web3 and FOSS/Linux
channel.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
channel.itunes:subtitle: Unkle Bonehead
channel.itunes:summary: Online radio DJ/podcaster that loves Freedom, decentralization, Web3 and FOSS/Linux

item.title: SEC vs XRP: Judgement S2ep21
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: SEC vs XRP: Judgement S2ep21
item.description:
Today Allen & Unkle B talk about the recent judgement handed down on the SEC vs XRP case

Today Allen & Unkle B talk about the recent judgement handed down on the SEC vs XRP case. What it means & what could come in the future for all crypto currency and the rest of Web3.Links mentioned:https://cointelegraph.com/news/ripple-wins-case-against-sec-as-judge-rules-xrp-is-not-a-securityhttps://www.courtlistener.com/docket/19857399/874/securities-and-exchange-commission-v-ripple-labs-inc/https://twitter.com/Allen_Taylor/status/1681334609953341442

Follow us on Hive:@defluencedcast@allentaylor@unkleboneheadSubscribe to Allen’s newsletter:https://paragraph.xyz/@tayloredcontent

item.title: The Sound of Freedom?
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: The Sound of Freedom?
item.description:
In this episode I first try to show off CastGardens Podcasting 2.0 features but failed miserably as I picked Podverse Web to attempt to subscribe to my own RSS feed.

In this episode I first try to show off CastGardens Podcasting 2.0 features but failed miserably as I picked Podverse Web to attempt to subscribe to my own RSS feed.Turns out that is only possible on the Podverse mobile app.After a couple of songs I mention a video you should watch if you’ve been seeing all the hype about the movie “Sound of Freedom”. I dont know why this movie is controversial but it is. And it’s really pretty disgusting that it is considered controverisal.But the video discusses some things that will make your blood boil as much as the human trafficking. I end the show with a cover of a tear jerking song that will send shivers down your spine and goose bumps across your entire body.Remember that children are our future and they are the most valuable and precious assets that the human race can ever produce. They can not, must not and will not be sold, traded or used as marketing pawn on any market. Those that do should be delt with in a swift and justified manner.Pedophiles are pure evil. Those that cater to them and provide them are just as evil. In my own opinion there is only one way to deal with evil. And that is a woodchipper.

As always take in as much informationa as you can and make your own decisions.Why I cant support Sound of Freedom - Trust but Verify - Off Grid with Doug & Stacy

The Playlist:

  • We’re Not Gonna Take It -Mariah Carey Christmas - There I Ruined It
  • Another One Bites the Dust (ft. Pee-wee Herman) - There I Ruined It
  • Censorship - ODDKO
  • Dirty Money - Tom Macdonald
  • Space Trash - Brandon Hart ft Tom Macdonald
  • When the Children Cry - KNULP

item.title: Web3 Missed It! Maybe. S2Ep20
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Web3 Missed It! Maybe. S2Ep20
item.description:
Today Allen Taylor & Unkle Bonehead discuss Threads and how Web3 missed a great chance for adoption.

Today Allen Taylor & Unkle Bonehead discuss Threads and how Web3 missed a great chance for adoption.We ponder on how & why it happened and wonder if there is a solution somewhere in sight for Web3’s adoption.Discussion came from https://www.bloomberg.com/news/newsletters/2023-07-11/threads-not-web3-is-the-twitter-replacement-for-now

Go subscribe to Allen’s newesletter on Paragraphhttps://paragraph.xyz/@tayloredcontent

item.title: Dont lose sight of the end goal!
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Dont lose sight of the end goal!
item.description:
I originally posted this back in January of 2023. But I think it still needs to be said so I am reposting this here hoping to ram the message home. Once again.

I’ve noticed a rift is beginning to occur. Many people are knocking CastGarden & similar apps without even trying them. If you are one I ask you to stop doing it. You are being no better than the old guard on Web2 screaming that Web3 is shit. You are being a two faced cry baby worried about your personal investments and denying what #Web3 is really about.

Web3 is not a crypto bros only destination.

  • It does not belong to any single blockchain.

  • It does not belong to any single protocol.

  • It does not belong to any single ecosystem of apps.

  • If there is an app you should try it and make your own decision to use it or not.

  • Dont try to sway others as to what you personally like or even have an investment in. If the app is better it will win.

  • Dont ever try to be a maxi on one single blockchain or protocol. If that happens and we end up with only one guess what. You just became centralized, again. In the immortal words of Red Foreman, “Dumbass”.

  • Dont do the proverbial “look a gift horse in the mouth”. These apps have expenses and there is typically a value attached to a blockchain which it then becomes a currency. That is how they pay for the physical infrastructure for the apps and the development of them. That stuff is not, never was and never will be free. Some of these apps/developers do take a percentage of rewards. I know of only a couple that have agreed to take less as the rewards become more valuable. Many of other projects have never stated that they would take less. So that insinuates that they will keep the same cut. No matter how valuable that token is. This is why you see them shilling so hard for one coin or the other. BE AWARE OF WHAT IS THEIR END GOAL!

    The end goal for #Web3 is NOT to make a huge profit for a few select people. The end goal is Freedom, privacy, security & autonomy for all users.

item.title: Social Tokens: Who, What & Why? S2Ep19
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Social Tokens: Who, What & Why? S2Ep19
item.description:
Today Allen & Unkle Bonehead discus Social Tokens. What they are, who they are for, how to create them & why someone would want one.

Today Allen & Unkle Bonehead discus Social Tokens. What they are, who they are for, how to create them & why someone would want one. A big take away from this is that when considering Social Tokens is to not look at it as an investment opportunity. As with most things in Web3 one of the core fundamental priciples is the content creator. Remember in Web3 you support the creator and not the content. Web3 should be about people not investments.

Links referenced: https://mirror.xyz/allentaylor.eth/mSoP8sj0uHNJexRT8no42_LncVEKJp0wTFypb4vH3QE

https://twitter.com/Allen_Taylor/status/1671206536679501837

https://bakemytoken.com/

https://www.thetilt.com/audience/creator-coin-experiment

https://paragraph.xyz/@tayloredcontent

item.title: The War on Crypto S2Ep18
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: The War on Crypto S2Ep18
item.description:
Allen & Unkle Bonehead discuss the recent lawsuits filed by the SEC against Binance and Coinbase.

Allen & Unkle Bonehead discuss the recent lawsuits filed by the SEC against Binance and Coinbase. What the litigation is, why they are doing it and what it could mean for Web3?

Topic came from Allen’s newsletter. Are you subscribed to it on Paragraph? https://paragraph.xyz/@tayloredcontent/sec-binance-coinbase

Links to complete litigation complaints filed on Binance and Coinbase: https://www.sec.gov/files/litigation/complaints/2023/comp-pr2023-101.pdf https://www.sec.gov/litigation/complaints/2023/comp-pr2023-102.pdf

Ecency promo clip by @epiko on Hive CastGarden clip by @cast.garden

Follow us on Hive: @allentaylor @unklebonehead @defluencedcast

item.title: Riding the Waves on Ecency's Decks 2.0! S2Ep17
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Riding the Waves on Ecency's Decks 2.0! S2Ep17
item.description:
Ecency released a major update earlier this week and it’s probably the best they’ve ever done.

Ecency released a major update earlier this week and it’s probably the best they’ve ever done. They gave us Decks 2.0 and introduced Ecency.Waves. A new short form competitor to Dbuzz & Leothreads. But rather than stop the competition they welcomed them in. You can post to Dbuzz, LeoThreads AND Waves all from the same place! Our minds are blown! This is now officially our favorite app for Hive! Very highly recommend you check it out. https://ecency.com

Release post https://ecency.com/hive-125125/@ecency/introducing-decks-and-waves?referral=unklebonehead

item.title: Whats next for Dbuzz? S2Ep15
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Whats next for Dbuzz? S2Ep15
item.description:
The Dbuzz proposal on Hive passed within a week of its drop. So we got @nathansenn on to talk about it and whats going to happen with Dbuzz and what to expect over the length of the proposal. It’s exciting and you dont want to miss this interview.

The Dbuzz proposal on Hive passed within a week of its drop. So we got @nathansenn on to talk about it and whats going to happen with Dbuzz and what to expect over the length of the proposal. It’s exciting and you dont want to miss this interview.

https://peakd.com/me/proposals/263 https://d.buzz

Join Dbuzz https://join.d.buzz/@unklebonehead https://join.d.buzz/@allentaylor —

Pre show live music was Tom Macdonald. https://hangovergang.com https://twitter.com/@iamtommacdonald https://www.youtube.com/@UCElGBUWDCa05jRzc2PfmGqQ

For those who dont know I try stream all my podcasts live on CastGarden. In the pre show (30-45 minutes in length) I typically play music from great independent artists and mashups or cover songs. If I have links for the artists I post them in the description so you can go purchase their music & merch. My CastGarden channel https://cast.garden/c/defluenced/videos

Find us:

  • https://defluenced.online
  • https://twitter.com/@defluencedOn Hive:
  • @defluencedcast
  • @allentaylor
  • @unklebonehead

CastGarden is the #1 Web3 Podcast Hosting platform. Grow your cross-app Podcasting 2.0 channel here with Fediverse, Blockchain and RSS syndication, P2P HD Streaming, Podping, Subtitles, unstoppable passive income and more. No more walled gardens! https://cast.garden

item.title: What is the form of a perfect internet? S2Ep13
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: What is the form of a perfect internet? S2Ep13
item.description:
Today’s episode was spurred, as usual, by the Cryptocracy newsletter. One of the stories Allen reported on was about what is the perfect internet? So that’s what Allen & I riffed about.

Today’s episode was spurred, as usual, by the Cryptocracy newsletter. One of the stories Allen reported on was about what is the perfect internet? So that’s what Allen & I riffed about. Thinking it would be a short 15 minute conversation. We were wrong. The conversation went on for nearly 45 minutes. As you will see, the answer to that question is not easily answered.

Allen has moved all of his mail lists from Substack to Paragraph. Over there he has 4 communites he’s created so when you sign up to Paragraph you can choose which ones you wish to subscribe to. https://paragraph.xyz/@tayoredcontent

You can also vote in Allen’s poll on Twitter to help him name his new Paragraph. https://twitter.com/Allen_Taylor/status/1653424919223345158

While you’re on Twitter give him and the podcast a follow!

You can get an NFT copy of Allen’s book “Web3 Social: How Creators Are Changing the World Wide Web (And You Can Too!)” on Readl https://readl.co/book/25730738359309784841103145527884708297477924404312994775503112673563267563530

You can email us at podcast@defluenced.online

https://defluenced.online Follow us on Hive @defluencedcast @allentayor @unklebonehead

item.title: Paragraph, Unicorns & AI, OhMy! S2Ep12
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Paragraph, Unicorns & AI, OhMy! S2Ep12
item.description:
Allen & I talk about the moving of the Cryptocracy newletter to Paragraph from Substack. Why he did it and the multiple benefits for both him and the readers.

Allen & I talk about the moving of the Cryptocracy newletter to Paragraph from Substack. Why he did it and the multiple benefits for both him and the readers.

We also covered some news and poked fun at the UMU and their Unicorn coins. Lol! https://paragraph.xyz/@cryptocracy/bitcoin-ethereum-decorrelate

Allen’s recent appearance on the NomadFury Podcast https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8c33ZSr8D6Y

Then we talked a little about Mirror and whats good about it. https://mirror.xyz/allentaylor.eth

You can get an NFT copy of Allen’s book “Web3 Social: How Creators Are Changing the World Wide Web (And You Can Too!)” on Readl https://readl.co/book/25730738359309784841103145527884708297477924404312994775503112673563267563530

You can email us at podcast@defluenced.online

https://defluenced.online Follow us on Hive @defluencedcast @allentayor @unklebonehead

This episode was streamed live on Cast.Garden while recording. You can join us on our CastGarden channel live on Tuesdays 5pm eastern. https://cast.garden/c/defluenced/videos

item.title: Hanging with Kencode DefluencedPodcast S2Ep10
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Hanging with Kencode DefluencedPodcast S2Ep10
item.description:
Today we got to hang out with @kencode, one of the developers of the Hive-Tube plugin and the master mind behind CastGarden

We find out who he is where he came from and just how much into code he really is.

This was a fun interview.

Current Hive-Tube sites

https://Vigilante.tv (alt news)

https://BeeToons.tv (animation)

https://Cast.Garden (podcasters)

Where to find out more:

Agorise, Ltd. | PeakD

https://hive-tube.com/

https://www.npmjs.com/package/peertube-plugin-hive-tube

http://agorise.chat - Matrix room

agorise@pm.me - Contact Ken

Wether you are already a podcaster, video content creator or just starting out. CastGarden is a great place to be. It’s bridging the gap between the #Fediverse and the best in blockchain based #Web3, Hive.

item.title: A Whole Lotta News S2Ep09
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: A Whole Lotta News S2Ep09
item.description:
This episode is slightly different than normal. We recorded this live and it worked pretty good.

This episode is slightly different than normal. We recorded this live and it worked pretty good. In this episode we cover a whole lotta news that came down this week. The news links are in the latest Crytocracy Substack.

  • https://cryptocracy.substack.com/p/do-kwon-arrested-the-president-kicks

item.title: Hanging with PVM S2Ep08
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Hanging with PVM S2Ep08
item.description:
Today we got to hang out with PVM. An awesome Web3 personality with NFT’s for charities and written content to an audience in the thousands.

Today we got to hang out with PVM. An awesome Web3 personality with NFT’s for charities and written content to an audience in the thousands.

Grab yourself the beverage of your choice and listen to a very interesting show. Lots of words of wisdom are contained inside this episode of the Defluenced Podcast.

You can follow PVM below

Publish0x

Humble Tractors - Collection | OpenSea

Humble Tractors AI 4 Charity - Collection | OpenSea

And most other places just look PVM. He’s literally everywhere.

item.title: 3Speaks Wiring Diagram S2Ep06
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: 3Speaks Wiring Diagram S2Ep06
item.description:
3Speak has made a post detailing an overview of their new Acela Core.

3Speak has made a post detailing an overview of their new Acela Core. I’m assuming the image in the post is meant to try to make it more simpler to see the overview. But it looks much more like a wiring diagram or schematic than an overview. I honestly dont see how or why there is a need to reinvent the wheel when there are existing solutions in play already. To us this looks like added points of failure, massive development and constant ongoing maintenance. Something that will require a lot of overhead to operate. Not to mention how many points of attack vectors will this open up?

Go read it and see the image for yourself.

https://peakd.com/threespeak/@threespeak/introducing-the-acela-core-upgrading-existing-web2-apps-into-true-web3-dapps

Allen’s book is now available on exclusively on Kindle at the moment. With a scheduled release date for everywhere else soon.

Dont forget to claim your FREE NFT of the book. Details are in the book.

Web3 Social How Creators Are Changing the World Wide Web (And You Can Too!) - [https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BW4W3JYK](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BW4W3JYK

item.title: The Deaths of Coil & Rally S2Ep05
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: The Deaths of Coil & Rally S2Ep05
item.description:
Coil has announced that they are shutting down. Interledger will still be going and we hope that someone will step in and take over where Coil left off.

Coil has announced that they are shutting down. Interledger will still be going and we hope that someone will step in and take over where Coil left off.

Rally has also thrown in the proverbial towel.

All links to these articles and more can be found in the Cryptocracy Newsletter here - https://cryptocracy.substack.com/p/its-a-sad-day-for-crypto

Do yourself a favor and subscribe while you are there!

Allen’s latest book, How Creators Are Changing the World Wide Web (And You Can Too!) is being released on February 15th and he is looking for volunteers to help with the launch. Go here to get all the deets - https://www.subscribepage.com/b2w8t2

item.title: The Latest Buzz about DBuzz S2Ep04
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: The Latest Buzz about DBuzz S2Ep04
item.description:
This week Allen & I sat down with Nathansenn & Chrisrice to talk about Dbuzz. https://d.buzz

This week Allen & I sat down with Nathansenn & Chrisrice to talk about Dbuzz. https://d.buzz

Duzz is a short form content (micro blogging) app for Hive. It’s fricking awesome and I personally use it.

Allen made his first “buzz” today and when you hear what they have coming you will be super excited for it. I cant wait to see what this app does in 2023.

If you do start using Dbuzz make sure you follow Allen & I there as well. @unklebonehead and @allentayor

You can also follow the podcast account @defluencedcast as well.

We also talked about another app that I got a little geeked out over. An encrypted instant messenger that uses Hive. I quietly tried it out during the show and am totally impressed by it. You can try it to at https://hive.pm

email us at podcast@defluenced.online

Main site - https://defluenced.online

Defluenced Radio https://defluence.me

You can also now get the podcasts and another live stream on CastGarden

https://cast.garden/c/defluenced

item.title: How to Fix Stephen Crowder's Problem S2Ep03
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: How to Fix Stephen Crowder's Problem S2Ep03
item.description:
In a bombshell of an episode of Louder with Crowder Steven literally nuked big Conservative media…

In a bombshell of an episode of Louder with Crowder Steven literally nuked big Conservative media stating that they were no different than the leftest media being in bed with big tech. Showing one of several contracts leveling outrageous requirements of a content creator and their content, advertisers and merchandise. Allen and I go over some things and reiterate that Web3 can solve a content creators problems such as these. It doesn’t matter the size of the creators audience. Web3 can and will scale to what they need. Web3 creators own their content, their audience and their platform. It’s cost effective and profitable. And you can most likely do all of that without sponsors or any kind of advertising. If I could get a message to Crowder. All I want is for him to at least look at some form of Web3 technology. Something like Hive (https://hive.io), a time tested, proven, working and scalable platform that is 100% open source and free. He could have a home base website to host his content, even his own social media platform to go along with the content. Stephen dont keep playing with the old tech. Embrace the new tech and OWN your stuff! Dont look for contracts. Look for solutions for your passion! Watch his episode “It’s time to stop” here. https://youtu.be/eTcq4UCTZ-Y

item.title: Aureal's Big Announcement S2Ep01
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Aureal's Big Announcement S2Ep01
item.description:
The podcast app Aureal has announced a partnership with Unstoppable Domains in their discord server.

In this episode:

The podcast app Aureal has announced a partnership with Unstoppable Domains in their discord server. An official announcement will come in mid January from both parties. This going to be huge and not just for Hive users. It’s going to be big for everybody on #Web3!

Link to Aureal’s discord post - https://discord.com/channels/675627804947120128/802198590163779584/1058567703792730172This is no longer in operationWe also talk about our new 24/7 radio station. I will be making an announcement in a couple of weeks looking for music and live show submissions.

Allen’s new book is launching soon and he is looking for help with the launch in exchange for a free advance review copy! Click the link below to go sign up!

https://www.subscribepage.com/b2w8t2

item.title: Cent Pages S1Ep14
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Cent Pages S1Ep14
item.description:
Here’s another solo episode by Allen. Today he talks about Cent Pages.

I gotta admit I’m very intrigued by this and cant believe I’ve never heard of it before. Take a listen and then go subscribe to him!

Allen’s Cent Page https://allentaylor.cent.co/

Sign up using Allen’s Cent Page referral https://tinyurl.com/4j8htuhs

—

Hive & Twitter: @defluencedcast

Join the discord: https://defluenced.online/discord

In this episode Unkle Bonehead is still out with no microphone so Allen is flying solo again.

He goes over 10 things he likes about Read.cash

Referral link below

item.title: PublishOx S1Ep12
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: PublishOx S1Ep12
item.description:
In this episode Allen is flying solo.

Actually he will be flying solo until after Christams. Unkle Bonehead’s audio interface died and a new one wont be in until after then. In this Episode he covers Publish0x. The good, the bad and the not so bad. He gets right to the point and makes it way more concise than it would have been with the two of us bantering about.

Hive & Twitter:

@defluencedcast

Join the discord:

https://defluenced.online/discord

Dont forget to subscribe to the podcast!

item.title: Secure your keys S1Ep11
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Secure your keys S1Ep11
item.description:
We had an issue where I (Unkle Bonehead) lost the keys for the Defluenced Hive account.

I ended up having to start a new one. So make sure you are following DefluencedCast.

Good Ideas

  • Back them up Back them up again in a different place.
  • Back them up a third time in yet another place.
  • Print them out on paper.
  • Put them in a safe.
  • Send a copy to a trusted friend or family member.
  • Repeat as many times as you feel necessary.

Bad ideas

  • Send them in unencrypted email to the FBI, CIA or any other 3 letter agency.
  • Post it notes on your monitor Bulletin board at your church, the library, or other public place.
  • On hard drives that have a history of failing.
  • Let your browser remember them Open forums and message boards.
  • Tattoo on your forearm.
  • On your dog’s ID collar.
  • On a refrigerator magnet in your RV.
  • Let Coinbase, Kraken, Binance, or another exchange hold your keys

NOT your keys, NOT your crypto!

What do you think? How do you back up and keep your keys safe? Let us know us if we missed anything.

Hive & Twitter:

@defluencedcast

Join the discord:

https://defluenced.online/discord

Subscribe to the podcast:

https://defluenced.online/subscribe

item.title: Web3 Wednesday, LBRY Lost S1Ep10

item.title: When FTX fails Decentralization Wins. S1E09
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: When FTX fails Decentralization Wins. S1E09
item.description:
We talk about the recent blowup of FTX and why it could be a good thing for Cryptosocial.

Links we talk about:

  • https://cryptocracy.substack.com/p/ftx-from-crypto-winter-to-nuclear
  • https://hivetoday.substack.com/p/hivetoday-44-decentralization-grows
  • https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/11/twitter-facebook-social-media-decline/672074/

We also tease Allen’s new book due sometime around the first of next year.

Thumbnail contains a free grunge overlay from https://www.photoshopsupply.com

item.title: Twitter Migration: Rise of the Fediverse S1Ep08
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Twitter Migration: Rise of the Fediverse S1Ep08
item.description:
In case you’ve been living under a rock. Elon Musk completed the deal and now owns Twitter.

There has been, what appears to be, a massive amount of people having a meltdown about this and it’s creating a mass exodus to the #Fediverse alternative to Mastodon.

Unkle Bonehead & Allen Taylor dive into this topic and discuss:

The pro’s & con’s of the Fediverse

Is it really better as in decentralized and secure?

Is it any more Free Speech than what Twitter’s offering? Both before & after Elon-gate (?) Musk-over(?)

Thumbnail contains a free grunge overlay from https://www.photoshopsupply.com

Contact us:

unklebonehead@murena.io

Hive & Twitter:

@defluenced

https://defluenced.online/discord

https://defluenced.online/subscribe

item.title: Web3 Idenitity Crisis Pt3S1Ep07
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Web3 Idenitity Crisis Pt3S1Ep07
item.description:
This week we finish our discussion of Web3’s Identity Crisis

[This article])(https://fundamentallabs.substack.com/p/web3-social-a-booming-space-with?sd=pf)

There is so much to unpack in this article that it has taken us 3 episodes to cover the majority of it. And honestly we didnt cover all of it.

Yes there really is that much info packed into the article and we strongly encourage you to go read the article several times to grasp the amount of info in it. And subscribe to Fundamental Labs while you’re there!

Other links mentioned:

Please show your support for Hive and Cryptocracy by voting in the Presearch Advertising Grants contest - https://presearchcommunity.typeform.com/GrantVote

Social networking technology created by Bluesky - https://atproto.com/

Thumbnail contains a free grunge overlay from https://www.photoshopsupply.com

This week we continue our discussion of Web3’s Identity Crisis

item.title: Platform Review: hive S1Ep04
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Platform Review: hive S1Ep04
item.description:
Today we do our first platform review and it is what we consider to be the best Cryptosocial platform currently available.

Description from Hive.io:

Hive is an innovative and forward-looking decentralized blockchain and ecosystem, designed to scale with widespread adoption of the currency and platforms in mind. By combining the lightning-fast processing times and fee-less transactions, Hive is positioned to become one of the leading Web3 blockchains used by people around the world.

What I like about Hive

Allen:

  1. Decentralization of access. Different interfaces for publishing. Hive.blog, ecency, Leo Finance
  2. More than 100 dapps. There are games, social applications, NFTs, decentralized finance, block explorers and other tools, sports and video apps.
  3. Hive also has a robust Hive Engine where users can create their own tokens and exchange tokens. These add a lot of value and utility to Hive.
  4. I also like that you can stake your Hive and save your HBD. 20% APR on HBD savings.
  5. Users also vote on witnesses and proposals. Through the Hive fund, proposals that get winning votes can be funded and executed.

Unkle Bonehead:

  1. Also the decentralization. Most if not all dapps are using IPFS for image and video hosting.
  2. Also the plethora of dapps of all kinds
  3. Immutability. You can self host one of several frontends or develop your own.
  4. You can purchase NFT’s and services with Hive. Including web hosting through Privex.
  5. The people. Hive is social media and the vast majority of people using it are real  people who engage with others. Not a bunch of bots just trying to make quick money.
  6. A content creators dream ecosystem

Find out more about Hive:

https://hive.io

Join Hive:

https://signup.hive.io/

Currently 160+ Hive dapps:

https://hiveprojects.io/

— 

How to contact us:

unklebonehead@murena.io

Join our discord:

https://defluenced.online/discord

Other ways to subscribe:

https://defluenced.online/subscribe/

item.title: What is Decentralization & Why is it needed? S1Ep03
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: What is Decentralization & Why is it needed? S1Ep03
item.description:
In this episode Allan and I talk about what decentralization means to us. What we think it should be and how it empowers the individual.

We also talk about these news stories.

https://cryptocracy.substack.com/p/us-treasury-recommends-cbdc (U.S. Treasury recommends a CBDC, but I don’t think there is anything to fear with a digital dollar)

https://techcrunch.com/2022/09/13/south-korea-issues-arrest-warrant-for-luna-founder-do-kwon/ (South Korea issues arrest warrant for Do Kwon)

https://gizmodo.com/coinbase-politics-crypto-bitcoin-brian-armstrong-ether-1849540342 (Coinbase launches tool to identify pro-crypto politicians)

Subscribe to the podcast

https://defluenced.online/subscribe

Join our Discord

https://defluenced.online/discord

You can donate to us at the wallets below:

All Hive-engine tokens

https://hivelive.me/donate/defluenced

item.title: Why Cryptosocial Networks are Needed S1Ep02
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Why Cryptosocial Networks are Needed S1Ep02
item.description:
In this episode we are going to go over the criteria and expectations that we think should be included in a Cryptosocial media platform. What we think you should look for in a social media home.

The Criteria:

  1. Is it decentralized?
  • How is it decentralized? Blockchain or federated?
  • Can you “trust” the platform to be there or can it disappear? This is the problem I (UB) have with the Fediverse. Most people cant self host so therefore they must put their trust in someone else to maintain an instance. Which means if that person runs out of money that instance can be shutdown without notification to the users of it.

3. Can it delete, ban or block you from access to your account?

4. If it’s a blockchain can you power down/unstake, convert and/or withdraw your crypto you earned on it?

5. How vibrant is the ecosystem that is being built around it? Is there more than one frontend to it?

6. How easy is it to get on board? Does it require any kind of KYC?

7. How is the platform funded? Venture capital? Private funding? Who is paying for the infrastructure?

8. Is there a company behind the blockchain? (This is important to me UB) I am not a fan of a company funded blockchain because that typically means they hold the lion’s share of the crypto and most likely fold up and move on if there isn’t a decent ROI.

9. Do the witnesses, founders, and other power brokers earn rewards and follow the same rules as everyone else or do they have a different set of rules for themselves?

If you have questions or just want to drop us a line and let us know how we are doing: podcast@defluenced.online

You can donate crypto to us:

Hive-engine tokens

https://hivelive.me/donate/defluenced

item.title: An Interview with Us S1ep01
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: An Interview with Us S1ep01
item.description:
People get banned from social media. Because they dont tow the line and big tech answers to no one. They are in control. Whether it’s left or right. If the platform has a TOS that states they can delete your account. Then you should expect it to happen at any time for any reason. Those kinds of terms means you are only ok with the current operators of the service. Until you do or say something that reflects bad on their real customers, the advertisers. Because you know they cant sell bad product (you)  to their customers.Watch on CastGarden

What we covered:

Who are we?

What this podcast is about & what it isnt

Why are we doing this podcast?

Where can you find this podcast?

Go here to find your favorite way to subscribe. - https://defluenced.online/subscribe/

 

How to contact us:

Discord - https://defluenced.online/discord

unklebonehead@murena.io

allen@tayloredcontent.com

https://unklebonehead.xyz

https://authorallentaylor.com

 

Additional reading:

  • read this book. - Not an affiliate link
  • Read this article

News we taked about:

FBI:Crooks are using this method to steal crypto

Cryptocurrency company accidentally transfers $10.5m to Austrailian woman and doesn’t notice for seven months - This could be HUGE!!!

item.title: Free Computer
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Free Computer
item.description:
This was originally posted to Ecency in May of 2023 by me.

For my job I work 90% remote which is usually at home. But I am required to physically go to the office at least twice a month on Fridays. Which is nice since 90% of my job involves talking on the phone and resolving problems in a tech/safety/legal type of situation. When I am required to be in the office is when I do things that I have to be done in that environment. Meeting & training with drivers & students, mountains of paperwork filing, accessing the local NAS, etc. You get the idea.

Story time

So I have basically ended up with two offices. For the one at home I had been secretly using Linux for well over a year before I finally came out and told the CEO I was returning the laptop he had provided when I started. It’s a nice Dell with 16gb of ram 500GB ssd with Window10 on it. It worked fine and did the job well. But my desktop was so much faster I couldnt pass up using it at home. He was actually shocked when I told him I hadnt used the laptop for so long. And gave me his blessing to continue using the OS of my choice at home. But in the office I have to use the one the IT company provided. It too was an acceptable Lenovo A10 with 12GB ram and a 2 TB HDD. A little slow because of the spinning hard drive but it got the job done.The Lenovo A10 as it sits on my desk now.

The Crash

About a month ago I went into the office and tried for almost an hour to get the Lenovo to boot. It was just stuck at the boot screen and wouldnt go any further. So I called the IT peeps and they showed up that afternoon with a new computer. Saying it was almost time for me to have a new one anyways.

He whipped out the little Dell mini tower he was replacing the Lenovo with and I had to catch my breath, it was so tiny! I asked what was inside and he said a 12 gen i5 16GB of ram and a 500GB nvme ssd. He laughed when I told him it would be running Linux by the end of the day. They put passwords on the bios to prevent their customer from playing with the new machines. Long story short I asked what was going to happen to the Lenovo since it was just a bad hard drive. He said they would just take it back to “computer room” on site. The machine belongs to the owner/CEO and he can do with them what he wants.

So I texted the boss and asked if I cold recycle it and give it a good home. He said sure. He also said that the next time we were both in the office together that he would unlock the computer room and let me take whatever I want!Do you see now why I say I have the greatest boss in the world?

Now the fun part

So I get it home and swap out the drive for another old spinner I knew was good. Threw on a current Linux Mint and boom. It’s up and running. A couple of reboots later and it freezes at the boot screen again. So it’s obviously not a dead hard drive. So I throw that 2TB back in and proceed with trouble shooting at my leisure over a couple of weeks. I checked everything I could think of. Power supply, different HDD’s, cleaning everything as good as I could as I went.

Then I hit pay dirt!

I’m not sure what it was actually because I did 2 things at once yesterday. I removed and cleaned both sticks of RAM and reseated them nice and tight. I did notice that when I pulled the RAM that one end of one stick was not pushed all the way in and locked. They are in snug and locked now for sure.

I also popped out the CMOS battery for about 5-10 minutes to reset the bios. Then I threw it all back together and fired it up with my fingers crossed.

IT BOOTED UP!

I was jumping for joy. But trying my best to not get too over excited. I quickly did a reboot.Then again.Another one.And one more.Each time it did a full boot without hanging. I was estatic. Since I’ve been using Ubuntu 23.04 since it’s release in April and completely satisfied with it I threw that on there to see how it would respond.Not a problem. I ran a stress test and this machine is actually performing better than my good computer. My good computer’s temp topped out at 87C. This Lenovo never went over 58C. Over the last 2 days I’ve rebooted it several times just trying to get it to hang. But I cant get it to do it. This is awesome to have a back up computer for work & play. So I’m keeping my fingers crossed that I found the problem.

My current work station. Top monitor is for the Lenovo A10 (on the right side of the desk). Bottom 2 are for my work horse (I named it BigBitch. It’s behind the monitors.)

About that title

When recycling old computers do not throw them away. Nearly every machine can be repaired or refurbrished and you can get many more years of use out of them. Computers that were manufactured in the last 4-5 years are built to to be just thrown away. Because they are built for people to get online and give all your data to Microsoft, Apple & Google. These computers are tools for them to build their profiles on us that they can sell.We can change their ways by continuing to reuse computers with Free and open source software and operating systems that dont collect your data. Some Linux distro’s do collect information on your machine to improve the OS. But thats as far as they go. Linux isnt hard to learn to use. For the average computer user it is literally no different than using WIndows or Mac. It’s got a web browser, office tools, audio/video editing, Steam, etc. A lot of the same apps you use on Windows & Mac are also on Linux. People only say it’s hard because it’s new to them and not what they are used to using.

If you get a new computer give your old one to the local computer store or give it away on Craigslist. Hell throw it on the Hivelist Community for a couple of Hive to cover shipping. I’m sure someone can make it work for cheaper than buying a new one. Not to mention not giving up their data and privacy while doing it too.

As for me, I cant wait to be at the office when the boss is there. Cause I bringing a big ass shopping cart and filling it with some new to me toys!

Crap, I just realized that I think I may need a bigger desk.Till next time, be safe and dont stick your finger where you wouldnt stick your face!

item.title: My New Site
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: My New Site
item.description:
So you may notice a change to the site here. It’s not just a blob of links to my social media and podcasts. I’m turning it into my own little corner of the web.

I dont want to make this post too god awful long. Becuase I’m not much into writing. Although I’ve been told I write better than I talk. Which I do agree. I suck at talking. Especially if I’ve been drinking. Lol.So let’s get into the nitty gritty of why I’m changed up my site.

#1 Money

Let’s face it. Money is tight these days. And my yearly bill is almost up for both sites. This one and Defluenced podcast. So I will not be renewing them. Instead I am migrating them both to Github pages and building them with Hugo.

Since both of them have pretty simple requirements I think I can get away with utilizing the same theme for both. I will of course you this site as a testing ground for things I want to implement on Deluenced.The audio/video media will be hosted on CastGarden for this site and I will do my best to keep it up to date everytime I post to CastGarden and long form content I post to Ecency.

#2 The US Federal Government

With the FED’s declaring war on crypto there is always a chance that they make crypto illegal in the USA and as a result cutting me off from Hive. Even though I dont use it as a crypto currentcy there is that aspect of it that the government just dont like for some reason.Must be that they percieve it as competition. Lol.I dont think they can shut it down but I wont put it passed them to attempt to geo block any domain associated with crypto exchanges and force the reporting of it to the IRS. Which is extremely stupid. As I’ve said many time before. I do not trust the government. Especially with the current adminstration full of hard nosed statits.

So there you have it. Those are the reasons why I made these changes and what you will see coming in the future.

TTYL

item.title: I use Ubuntu, btw.
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: I use Ubuntu, btw.
item.description:
I gave Ubuntu 23.04 a good try and I like it.

Watch on CastGarden

I gave Ubuntu 23.04 a good try and I like it. IMO it’s the best one so far. You dont have to use the snaps if you dont want. Just install Flatpak and boom. Get your work done.The new flutter installer worked like a charm on my machine except for not adding a swap partition. Two weeks solid as a daily driver for work and play and no issues after adding the swap.Check out Ubuntu here.

item.title: Ub Live 3/26/23
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Ub Live 3/26/23
item.description:
Windows is against a religion? Music, Hive News & more!

  • Employee cant use windows for religous reasons | Reddit

  • Aureal Partners with Skollab | Ecency

What I am looking at for 24/7 audio broadcast

They are good for low bandwidth peeps. I will be experimenting with these if I can get them to work. They are old except for one but it is windows only.

  • https://p2p-radio.sourceforge.net/
  • https://s2s.sourceforge.net/

Tonights Playlist:

Featured Music:

StickUpBoys - Turn Me Up & We’re Going Out (James Black Remix)

Tom MacDonald - Snowflakes

Frog Leap Studios - ABCDEFU (Metal Cover)

Other links I Like:

https://cast.garden

https://vigilante.tv

https://www.freedomdecrypted.com/

https://www.thinkpenguin.com/

https://lrn.fm/

@unklebonehead@social.freetalklive.com Fediverse

My Defluenced Channel on the Fediverse @defluenced@cast.garden

item.title: Some Artists I want on Web3 NOW!
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Some Artists I want on Web3 NOW!
item.description:
I ran across a really awesome guitar player that uses Linux. I got to thinking of some artists that are some what, if not completely unknown to a large portion of the world. And I couldnt let a another second go by without bringing them to you.

I got to thinking of some artists that are some what, if not completely unknown to a large portion of the world. And I couldnt let a another second go by without bringing them to you.First up is Raul Dipeas. One hell of a guitar player and a fellow Linux user. I play 3 of his songs.Raul Dipeas - Personal Site

His YouTube

  • Lick Me | Nils Norberg
  • Tua gloria Renascer Praise featuring Bianca Kosztits
  • Garcom | Reginaldo Rossi

Then I also got to thinking “What if this [insert random band name] had did this [insert random song name]. Then I did a search and it turns out there is others out there on the inter webs that do the same kind of thinking as me. These two are exceptionally good at this.

Denis Pauna - YouTube

Original Music

Patreon

What if ZZTop wrote Seek & Destroy?What if Alice in Chains wrote Nothing Else Matters?Moonic Productions - YouTube

Moonic Productions Site

Patreon

If SLAYER wrote BEAT IT?If METALLICA wrote Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go?If System Of A Down wrote Toxic?If AC/DC wrote Funkytown?If System Of A Down wrote YMCA?If Slayer wrote Beat It?If Pantera wrote Back in Black?

Enjoy the music and go tell these 3 artists you would love more of their music and they have an audience on #Web3 waiting for them.

item.title: Radio Update
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Radio Update
item.description:
I blow off some steam and talk about Hive, radio stations and music.

Watch on CastGarden

AudioMotion - The coolest Free & opensource, cross platform audio player that you will find.

I also reveal that Defluenced Radio will be hosted on Lokinet. UPDATE: NO IT"S NOT GONNA HAPPEN>*

Some of you may have seen I’ve been having an issue with Aureal. It’s hopefully finally resolved and they even out did themselves. I almost feel like I was banned. Why? Watch the video and I show you so you can see it with your own 2 eyes.But no hard feelings. I will just use CastGarden to distribute and a good old fashioned RSS feed reader for the ones not on CG.

The next two points should probably just be filed under the “NO” category:

  • Project Blank combines the possibilities of Twitter, Pinterest, Tumblr, Instagram & Medium — Hive
  • Dont you dare put ads on a #Web3 frontend!

Music played:

  • Tom Macdonald/Nove Rockefeller/Brandon Hart - “No Good Bastards”
  • Judette - “Shes Got the Sentinel”
  • Frostbite Orkings - “Gaurdians of Tme” - World’s first fully AI created band. (It’s actually really good and no copyright infringements with real musicians!)

item.title: How to Upload Audio/Video to CastGarden
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: How to Upload Audio/Video to CastGarden
item.description:
A quick and simple tutorial on how to upload audio/video to CastGarden. Plus I throw in a few simple tips to simplify and streamline the work flow.

Watch on CastGarden

A quick and simple tutorial on how to upload audio/video to CastGarden. Plus I throw in a few simple tips to simplify and streamline the work flow.

item.title: How to Stream to CastGarden
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: How to Stream to CastGarden
item.description:
A quick tutorial on how to live stream to CastGarden.

Watch on CastGardenA quick tutorial on how to live stream to CastGarden.

<This video was imported from YouTube using CastGardens ‘import from url" option.

CastGarden is Peertube instance that utilizes the Hive-Tube plugin for podcasters and to monetize their content with the Hive blockchain. It has Podcasting 2.0 capabilities, streams in P2P and is also on #Lokinet.If you are a podcaster and interested in syndicating/monetizing your content on it the contact info is on their about page.CastGarden

item.title: Ecency: Making Waves
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Ecency: Making Waves
item.description:
The Hive social media front end Ecency released the best update I’ve seen in the almost 3 yrs I’ve been on it. This is outstanding and I check it in this video.

Watch on CastGarden

The Hive social media front end Ecency released the best update I’ve seen in the almost 3 yrs I’ve been on it. This is outstanding and I check it in this video.Post about this update:https://ecency.com/hive-125125/@ecency/introducing-decks-and-wavesLearn more about Ecencyhttps://ecency.comFor those who watched live on Cast.Garden you heard TomMacDonaldOfficial latest “Dirty Money” and moonicproductions “If Pantera did Back in Black”. Those songs are edited out of this video because I want you to go and support them by buying their music & merch.

item.title: Live Stream
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Live Stream
item.description:
I stream live on Cast.Garden

It’s the only place I stream my solo stuff. If you want to see & hear the good stuff you gotta go here.It’s decentralized, federated & based on Peertube. It even has a SNaP on Lokinet and an Onion site for those of us in the know.

Times I most often go Live:

  • Tuesdays from 5pm - 6pm eastern standard time.

  • I will randomly go live other nights as well. Usually after 7pm. Watch Dbuzz, Ecency and Twitter for announcements.

  • Saturday mornings are always up for grabs if I have something to say or found some awesome music.

  • Saturdays 7pm - 10pm eastern standard time.

    Saturday nights are simulcast on MSPWaves, VimmTV and ThetaTV as well as CastGarden.

Other places you can find me:

  • https://ecency.com/@unklebonehead
  • https://d.buzz/@unklebonehead
  • https://twitter.com/defluenced
  • https://twitter.com/3speakvidshare
  • https://youtube.com/@defluenced
  • https://youtube.com/@unklebonehead
  • https://rumble.com/user/UnkleBonehead

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Privacy Policy
item.description:
There isn’t one. I do not track you or your presence here. I am not a stalker and you shouldn’t be either. It’s not a very healthy way to live. You should probably go outside and touch grass or seek professional help if you are stalking me.

Comments

Are not allowed on this site. If you wish to leave comments please contact me on Ecency.com or one of the other social media sites I am on.

Media

The majority of the audio/video media is hosted on Cast.Garden. Some content of the audio/video contain copy written material that is used with express permission from the holders with the intent to provide free advertisement of the performers. I am not paid to play any content and do not attempt to make any monetary gain from them. I want you to go buy it from the artists.

Cookies?

Are awesome. Best served with a glass of ice cold milk.

Who I share your data with?

Nobody. As already mentioned I dont even know you are here looking in through the windows.

How long we retain your data?

Never. Dont have it, cant keep it.

What rights you have over your data?

You should have all of them. It’s your data after all. Stop giving it up to the big tech companies and get on Web3 social media like Mastadon, Ecency & Dbuzz. Use places such as Cast.Garden & Peertube for podcasts and entertainment.

  • https://ecency.com - Long & short form content similar to Facebook.
  • https://d.buzz - Short form text content similar to Twitter.
  • https://cast.garden - Podcasting 2.0 host and subscription platform. Based on the fantastic Peertube.

Where your data is sent

With big tech who knows? It’s most likely the highest paying advertiser. Did you know that Google has a profile they have built on every user over the many years that they’ve had an account. That includes people in the USA that are now old enough to drink, vote. There are adults alive right now that have a Google profile from the day they were born! That company knows literally everything about them.

Why did they do this?

Because they see humans as a product they sell to advertisers and we let them do it for some “free” stuff.

We all should be ashamed of ourselves for allowing it!

item.title: Subscribe
item.itunes:author: Unkle Bonehead
item.itunes:subtitle: Subscribe
item.description:
UB Live

  • CastGarden
  • YouTube
  • Rumble

Defluenced Podcast

A podcast hosted by my self & author Allen Taylor where we explore & explain what #Web3 is and the technology behind it. Why it’s needed and what to expect from it.Thumbnail contains a free grunge overlay from https://www.photoshopsupply.com
